S

setup() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Executed before each test.
shouldGetDepartmentByDepartmentKey() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.DepartmentHandlerTests
Should get the Department by the Department key.
shouldGetDepartments() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.DepartmentHandlerTests
Should get the list of Departments.
shouldGetEmployeeByDepartmentKeyAndNames() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.EmployeeHandlerTests
Should get the Employee by the Department key and names.
shouldGetTeamRankById() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Should get the rank of Team by Team id.
shouldGetTeams() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Should get the list of Teams.
shouldGetTeamsRangeByScore() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Should get the range of Teams by score.
shouldNotGetDepartmentByUnknownKeyAndGetStatusNotFound() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.DepartmentHandlerTests
Should not get the Department by the unknown key and get status 'Not Found'.
shouldNotGetDepartmentsAndGetStatusNotFound() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.DepartmentHandlerTests
Should not get the list of Departments and get status 'Not Found'.
shouldNotGetEmployeeByUnknownKeyAndGetStatusNotFound() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.EmployeeHandlerTests
Should not get the Employee by unknown Department key and correct names.
shouldNotGetEmployeeByUnknownNamesAndGetStatusNotFound() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.EmployeeHandlerTests
Should not get the Employee by correct Department key and unknown names.
shouldNotGetTeamRankByBadIdAndGetStatusBadRequest() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Should not get the rank of the Team by the bad id and get status 'Bad Request'.
shouldNotGetTeamRankByUnknownIdAndGetStatusNotFound() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Should not get the rank of the Team by the unknown id and get status 'Not Found'.
shouldNotGetTeamsAndGetStatusNotFound() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Should not get the list of Teams and get status 'Not Found'.
shouldNotGetTeamsRangeByBadScoreAndGetStatusBadRequest() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Should not get the Teams range by the bad score and get status 'Bad Request'.
shouldNotGetTeamsRangeByUnknownScoreAndGetStatusNotFound() - Method in class kp.company.handlers.TeamHandlerTests
Should not get the Teams range by the unknown score and get status 'Not Found'.
